sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75221" key="o)rniqobo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-βόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75221.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devouring chickens,</tr_> of the fox, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
